value.found_quote: **Allow**: The action is auto-approved without prompting. ... **Allow list** — actions that run without prompting: command(git) ... command(*) # Prompt all commands
value.rationale: The page describes a permission engine where terminal `command` actions can be configured in an Allow list (auto-executed without prompting) versus an Ask list (prompts before execution). This directly substantiates terminal command auto-execution with allow lists, as part of Google's Antigravity. The core permission feature is described as active; only terminal sandboxing is noted as preview.
